instruction: Write a Common Lisp macro `power-of-2-p` that returns true iff its single argument is a positive power of two, evaluating the argument exactly once.
original_failure_log_excerpt:
MISMATCH
EXPECTED: (LET ((#:G1 (LENGTH ITEMS)))
            (AND (PLUSP #:G1) (ZEROP (LOGAND #:G1 (1- #:G1)))))
ACTUAL:   (LET ((#:G112 (LENGTH ITEMS)))
            (AND (PLUSP #:G112) (ZEROP (LOGAND #:G112 (1- #:G112)))))

--- stderr ---
